commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR promotes standalone serialized tool-call text into structured embedded-runner tool calls and extends shared plaintext tool-call parsing, buffering, and XMLish payload-cap coverage.

PR surface: Source +746, Tests +727. Total +1473 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence path: stream an XMLish serialized tool-call block past 256000 buffered characters and the new wrapper flushes buffered text events instead of suppressing them; I did not run a repro command to keep the checkout read-only.
commands.review_followup: A narrow automated repair can make over-cap serialized tool-call buffers suppress or scrub instead of flushing raw text, then add focused regression coverage.

target.title: fix: promote serialized tool calls in harness
target.body:
## Summary

- Promotes standalone serialized text tool calls in the embedded runner into structured `toolCall` blocks so they execute through the normal tool lifecycle instead of leaking into chat.
- Extends the shared plaintext tool-call parser/buffer handling for XML parameter payloads, case/alias matching, interleaved partials, cancellation, terminal errors, and whitespace-sensitive arguments.
- Keeps provider compat buffering aligned so provider wrappers do not stream raw serialized tool text before final conversion.
- Restores the cumulative XMLish payload cap for promotion while still stripping oversized serialized tool-call blocks from user-visible text.

## Flow

```mermaid
flowchart TD
  A["Provider stream emits assistant text"] --> B{"Standalone serialized tool call?"}
  B -- "No" --> C["Stream normal assistant text"]
  B -- "Maybe" --> D["Buffer partial text instead of displaying it"]
  D --> E{"Terminal message is only serialized tool-call text?"}
  E -- "No" --> F["Scrub serialized block from visible text"]
  E -- "Yes" --> G["Parse allowed tool name and arguments"]
  G --> H{"Within execution payload cap?"}
  H -- "No" --> F
  H -- "Yes" --> I["Promote to structured toolCall"]
  I --> J["Run through normal tool lifecycle"]
  J --> K["Return tool result to model"]
```

## Comment follow-up

- Restored cumulative XMLish `maxPayloadBytes` enforcement across multiple parameters.
- Added regression coverage for multi-parameter XML blocks whose combined payload exceeds the cap.
- Split execution parsing from final text stripping so over-cap serialized tool calls are not promoted, but are still removed from outbound/user-visible text.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugin-sdk/tool-payload.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/provider-stream-shared.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.tool-call-normalization.test.ts` - 4 files, 73 tests passed on Node 24.14.0.
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core.tsbuildinfo`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.test.src.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/test-src.tsbuildinfo`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/tool-policy-shared.ts src/agents/tool-policy.ts src/plugin-sdk/provider-stream-shared.ts src/plugin-sdk/provider-stream-shared.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/tool-payload.ts src/plugin-sdk/tool-payload.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.tool-call-normalization.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.tool-call-normalization.test.ts && git diff --check`
- `AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` - clean; no accepted/actionable findings.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: standalone serialized tool-call text is converted to structured tool calls at the harness layer and withheld from streamed chat surfaces while pending; oversized serialized XMLish tool-call blocks are rejected for execution promotion but still stripped from user-visible text.

Real environment tested: Blacksmith Testbox through Crabbox, provider `blacksmith-testbox`, lease `tbx_01kskfr514y2a0ye0afp55x9f2`, commit `7fe6005b9c57e4af84fd75ea141353e9cd83e2e3`, GitHub Actions run https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/26484622258.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```sh
git rev-parse HEAD; grep -R 'strips oversized XML parameter tool calls without promoting them' -n src/plugin-sdk/tool-payload.test.ts || true; openclaw-testbox-env env CI=1 NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 OPENCLAW_TESTBOX=1 OPENCLAW_TESTBOX_REMOTE_RUN=1 OPENCLAW_LIVE_TEST=1 OPENCLAW_LIVE_GATEWAY_SMOKE=1 OPENCLAW_LIVE_TEST_QUIET=0 OPENCLAW_LIVE_GATEWAY_PROVIDERS=openai OPENCLAW_LIVE_GATEWAY_MODELS=openai/gpt-5.5 OPENCLAW_LIVE_GATEWAY_MAX_MODELS=1 OPENCLAW_LIVE_GATEWAY_STEP_TIMEOUT_MS=90000 OPENCLAW_LIVE_GATEWAY_MODEL_TIMEOUT_MS=600000 pnpm test:live:gateway-profiles
```

Evidence after fix: Copied live console output from Crabbox:

```text
7fe6005b9c57e4af84fd75ea141353e9cd83e2e3
296:  it("strips oversized XML parameter tool calls without promoting them", () => {
[live] [all-models] running 1 models (thinking=low)
[live] [all-models] heartbeat=30s probe-timeout=90s agent-timeout=570s agent-wait=580s model-timeout=600s transcript-timeout=600s
[live] [all-models] anthropic keys loaded: 2
[live] [all-models] 1/1 openai/gpt-5.5: prompt
[agent/embedded] [trace:embedded-run] startup stages: runId=idem-11c8102d-b656-420d-8422-5b36600ecb19 sessionId=7aaeed7e-e49d-4738-bdd9-e759ef1686b0 phase=attempt-dispatch totalMs=20136 stages=workspace:0ms@0ms,runtime-plugins:20035ms@20035ms,hooks:1ms@20036ms,model-resolution:46ms@20082ms,auth:50ms@20132ms,context-engine:1ms@20133ms,attempt-workspace:2ms@20135ms,attempt-prompt:0ms@20135ms,attempt-runtime-plan:1ms@20136ms,attempt-dispatch:0ms@20136ms
[live] [all-models] 1/1 openai/gpt-5.5: model: still running (30s)
[live] [all-models] 1/1 openai/gpt-5.5: tool-read
[live] [all-models] 1/1 openai/gpt-5.5: tool-only regression
[agent/embedded] empty response detected: runId=idem-cbe8c3d8-7c44-4765-af75-d62993b10a96-1 sessionId=7aaeed7e-e49d-4738-bdd9-e759ef1686b0 provider=openai/gpt-5.5 — retrying 1/1 with visible-answer continuation
[live] [all-models] 1/1 openai/gpt-5.5: model: completed after 50s
[live] [all-models] 1/1 openai/gpt-5.5: done
[live] [minimax] no candidates with keys; skipping dual endpoint probes
```

Observed result after fix: The command completed on the remote environment. The live gateway path reached the embedded runner, exercised `tool-read` and `tool-only regression`, and returned without exposing serialized tool-call text as chat output.

What was not tested: No additional provider families or OS targets beyond the OpenAI gateway smoke on Linux Testbox.

Refs #86924
target.author: fuller-stack-dev
